fault_hypothesis: The code on line 71 incorrectly removes an element if both input lists share the same last element. This faulty de-duplication logic violates the expectation that a merge operation should preserve all elements, resulting in a list that is one element too short.

constraints.intent: After this line, the merged list length must equal the sum of input lengths, even if a shared element was processed.
The de-duplication logic in this branch must not violate the total element count.
After appending tails from both lists, the merged length should be the sum of the input lengths.
The final returned list must contain all elements from both input lists.
